query: SELECT * FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Jiading%' OR hostName LIKE '%Ayi%' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT * FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Jiading%' OR hostName LIKE '%Ayi%' LIMIT 1;
messages: 150001	Jiading Ayi 	https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882814/host-images/m953al1omf5zczdkum7h.jpg	["Mandarin", "Basic English"]	Auntie Lee — a true daughter of Jiading Old Town, the very cradle of Shanghai's famous soup dumplings (Xiao Long Bao). Since 2016, she has been a Superhost on Airbnb, welcoming hundreds of guests into her courtyard home. Though her English is limited, her hospitality is universal: she has traveled widely herself and communicates flawlessly through the language of delicious food.

She’ll be joined by her daughter (management at foreign-owned company) or her daughter’s childhood friend (multinational corporate background), ensuring smooth conversation and cultural bridge-building over the meal or other activities.	["cooking-class", "market-visit", "cultural-tour"]	annnwooo@hotmail.com		Jiading	NULL	{"saturday": ["lunch"], "sunday": ["lunch"]}	6	Ancient Shanghaiese style	NULL	Step into Auntie’s cozy home (together with her daughter!) where the kitchen fills with the aroma of slow-braised Hong Shao Rou (red-braised pork belly) and simmering Egg Dumpling Soup—true Benbang comfort food.
Spring: Fresh bamboo shoots dug from the backyard garden
Summer: Giant juicy grapes from Malu Town (famous local specialty)
Autumn: Osmanthus lattes made with flowers shaken from tree in the yard
Winter: Frost-kissed vegetables from the earth, transformed into hands-on Vegetable & Pork Wonton (Wrapping lessons also available)

You'll dine family-style at auntie's sunny garden or indoor wooden roundtable (2-6 guests max), enjoying dishes you won't find in restaurants—just honest, seasonal home cooking. []	approved	NULL	2026-01-31 11:33:54	2026-03-15 22:23:25	799	0	3	NULL	I'm deeply rooted in Jiading and Shanghai - this is my home and my passion. My expertise comes from a lifetime of living and cooking in Shanghai, not from traveling abroad. I believe the best hospitality comes from truly knowing your own culture.	I'm known as a true daughter of Jiading Old Town - the birthplace of Shanghai's famous Xiao Long Bao! Since 2016, I've been a Superhost on Airbnb, welcoming hundreds of guests from around the world into my courtyard home.	Though my English is limited, I believe hospitality is universal. I communicate through the language of delicious food, and I love sharing the warmth of authentic Shanghai home cooking with visitors. Every meal is a chance to connect across cultures.	I'm passionate about preserving traditional Jiading culinary heritage, especially our famous soup dumplings. I love sharing stories about old Shanghai neighborhoods and introducing guests to the authentic flavors that have been passed down through generations in my family.	I love sharing stories about old Shanghai neighborhoods and local history. I enjoy showing guests around Jiading Old Town and introducing them to the authentic local lifestyle beyond just the dining experience.
